---
title: "Home"
---

<div class="hero-container">

<div class="hero-left">

# Eduardo Gonzalez Villarreal

### Graduate Student | Healthcare Analytics | Public Health Data Science

Welcome to my personal website. I am a graduate student working in healthcare analytics and machine learning applications in public health. My main interests are in chronic disease epidemiology. I have experience with data analysis and visualization in R and SAS.

This site showcases some of the projects I completed as a graduate student, including dashboards, epidemiologic analyses, and applied data science work.

</div>

<div class="hero-right">

```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width='80%', fig.align='center'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/profile.png")

```
